message:
test(e2e): add --robot-metrics and --robot-replay tests (ntm-z7ks)

Add 8 E2E tests for TUI parity robot commands:

--robot-metrics tests:
- TestRobotMetricsWithValidSession: Success with valid tmux session
- TestRobotMetricsPeriodFlag: Period variations (default, 1h, 7d, all)
- TestRobotMetricsNonExistentSession: SESSION_NOT_FOUND error handling
- TestRobotMetricsAgentHints: _agent_hints presence and structure

--robot-replay tests:
- TestRobotReplayMissingHistoryID: Error when --replay-id not provided
- TestRobotReplayNonExistentHistoryID: Error for invalid history ID
- TestRobotReplayDryRunFlag: Dry run mode behavior

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
